manure_management.title: Manure data
manure_management.description: You thought it's a waste, but those crops need to eat as well

fertilizer_schedule.title: Fertilizer schedule.
fertilizer_schedule.description: Fertilizer is like butter, you can never have too much.

manure_schedule.title: Manure schedule.
manure_schedule.description: Crappier than having 7:45 am classes Monday - Friday.

field.title: Field specification
field.description: Contains overall field properties and references to specification files.

start_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will start.

end_date.description: The year and Julian day on which the simulation will end.

set_seed.description: Whether or not to set random seed

simulate_animals.description: Whether or not to simulate animals during the simulation

nutrient_standard.description: The nutrient standard to use for feed.

calf_num.description: Number of Calves (head) -- The average number of pre-weaned calves (default is ~8% of herd number)

heiferI_num.description: Number of HeiferIs (head) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding

heiferII_num.description: Number of HeiferIIs (head) -- HeiferII is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy

heiferIII_num_springers.description: Number of HeiferIIIs (head) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers

cow_num.description: Number of Cows (head) -- The initial number of dry and lactating cows (all parities, default is ~51% of herd number).

herd_num.description: Herd Number (head) -- The target number of dry and lactating cows on farm.

herd_init.description: Initialize Herd? -- Whether to re-initialize the animal database, where the herd animals are selected from.

breed.description: Breed (select one Holstein/Jersey) -- The predominant breed of the herd (Holstein or Jersey)

breeding_start_day_h.description: Breeding Start Day - Heifers (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be eligible for breeding (days)

heifer_repro_method.description: Heifer Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; Synch-ED - Combination of ED and TAI

cow_repro_method.description: Cow Reproductive Program (select one) -- TAI - Timed Artificial Insemination; ED - Estrus Detection; ED-TAI -Combination of ED and TAI

semen_type.description: The semen type that makes up a majority of the farm's breedings

days_in_preg_when_dry.description: Days In Pregnancy When Dry (days) -- The average day in pregnancy when a cow is dried off (default is 218)

heifer_repro_cull_time.description: Heifer Reproductive Cull Time (days) -- Days old when a heifer would be culled for unsuccessful in breeding (default is 500)

do_not_breed_time.description: Do Not Breed Time (days) -- The breeding period (days) for cows before reproductive programs stop if they fail to get pregnant (days)

cull_milk_production.description: Cull Milk Production (kg/d) -- Minimum daily milk production for do-not breed cow to be culled (default is 30 kg/d)

cow_times_milked_per_day.description: Number of Times Cows Milked (per day) -- The average or most common number of times the cows are milked, whole numbers 1-3

male_calf_rate_sexed_semen.description: Male Calf Rate - Sexed Semen -- The rate of male calves when using sexed semen (default is 0.1)

male_calf_rate_conventional_semen.description: Male Calf Rate - Conventional Semen -- The rate of male calves when using conventional semen (default is 0.53)

keep_female_calf_rate.description: Female Calf Rate -- The rate female calves are kept and raised on-farm (default is 1)

wean_day.description: Wean Day (days) -- Days the calf is fully weaned from milk or milk replace (default is 60

milk_type.description: Milk Type (select one) -- The type of milk that is used to feed calves (Whole or Replacer)

voluntary_waiting_period.description: Voluntary Waiting Period (days) -- If 'TAI' (Timed Artificial Insemination) is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when the 1st hormonal injection is made in TAI programs. If 'ED' or 'ED-TAI' is chosen for cow, it is days after parturition when estrus is started to be monitored.

conception_rate_decrease.description: Conception Rate Decrease -- the decrease of the conception rate for later breeding (default is 0.026)

avg_gestation_len.description: Average Gestation Length (days) -- average length of gestations (default is 278)

std_gestation_len.description: Gestation Length Standard Deviation (days) -- standard deviation of gestation length (default is 6)

prefresh_day.description: Prefresh Day (days) -- length of period of the transition before calving (default is 30)

calving_interval.description: Calving Interval (days) -- current average calving interval (days), used for initial bodyweight adjustment and other calculations

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)

estrus_service_rate.description: Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 1)

ed_conception_rate.description: ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)

heifer_TAI_protocol.description: Heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol (select one) -- The breeding protocol for heifers (md5CG2P or md5CGP)

md5CG2P_conception_rate.description: Heifer Conception Rate for md5CG2P Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CG2P protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.6)

md5CGP_conception_rate.description: Heifer Conception Rate for md5CGP Protocol -- The conception rate for md5CGP protocol in heifer TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

heifer_synchED_protocol.description: Heifer SynchED Protocol (select one) -- 2P: two injections of PGF (prostaglandin), watch for estrus after each injection with insemination upon heat detection; CP: 7 days CIDR implements, inject PGF upon removal, insemination upon heat detection

estrus_detection_rate_h_synch.description: ED Rate for SynchED Protocol -- The estrus detection rate of the SynchED protocol.

estrus_detection_rate.description: Estrus Detection Rate -- The % of in-heat animals that would be detected in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)

estrus_service_rate.description: Estrus Service Rate -- The % of detected in heat animals that would be serviced in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 1)

ed_conception_rate.description: ED Conception Rate -- The % of serviced animals that would be concepted in the ED (Estrus Detection) programs (default is 0.6)

cow_presynch_protocol.description: Cow Presynch Protocol -- The preSynch protocol (1st breeding) for cow in TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cow_TAI_protocol.description: Cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) Protocol -- The timed AI protocol for cows in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

ovsynch56_conception_rate.description: OvSynch56 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch56 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 56hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program (default is 0.6)

ovsynch48_conception_rate.description: OvSynch48 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for OvSynch 48 protocol (pre-breeding GnRH shot given 48hrs post prostaglandin) in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cosynch72_conception_rate.description: CoSynch72 Conception Rate -- The conception rate for CoSynch 72 protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cosynch5d_conception_rate.description: 5d CoSynch Conception Rate -- The conception rate for 5d CoSynch protocol in cow TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

cow_resynch_protocol.description: Cow Resynch Protocol -- Resynch protocol for cow before/at/after pregnancy check day in the TAI (Timed Artificial Insemination) program

tai_program_start_day.description: TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol -- The TAI program start day for ED-TAI protocol.

birth_weight_avg_ho.description: Average Holstein Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 43.9)

birth_weight_std_ho.description: Holstein Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Holstein cows (default is 1)

birth_weight_avg_je.description: Average Jersey Birth Weight (kg/head) -- The average birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 35)

birth_weight_std_je.description: Jersey Birth Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation birthweight for Jersey cows (default is 1)

target_heifer_preg_day.description: Target Heifer Pregnancy Day (days) -- The target pregnant age in days for heifers - for adjusting heifer body weight (default is 420)

mature_body_weight_avg.description: Average Mature Body Weight (kg/head) -- The average mature body weight of cows (default is 740.1)

mature_body_weight_std.description: Mature Body Weight Standard Deviation (kg/head) -- The standard deviation of mature body weight of cows (default is 73.5)

preg_check_day_1.description: Pregnancy Check Day 1 (days) -- Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the first time (default is 32).

preg_loss_rate_1.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 1 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy before the 1st pregnancy check (default is 0.02)

preg_check_day_2.description: Pregnancy Check Day 2 (days) --  Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the second time if the animal pass the first pregnancy check (default is 60).

preg_loss_rate_2.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 2 -- % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 1st and 2nd pregnancy check (default is 0.096)

preg_check_day_3.description: Pregnancy Check Day 3 (days) -- Days since last insemination to check whether the animal is pregnant or not for the third time if the animal passes the second pregnancy check (default is 200).

preg_loss_rate_3.description: Pregnancy Loss Rate 3 -- The % of cows that abort their pregnancy between the 2nd and 3rd pregnancy check (default is 0.017)

avg_estrus_cycle_return.description: Average days between calving and first estrus after calving (default is 23).

std_estrus_cycle_return.description: Standard deviation of days between calving and first estrus after calving (default is 6).

avg_estrus_cycle_heifer.description: Average length of estrus cycle for heifers (default is 21).

std_estrus_cycle_heifer.description: Standard deviation of the length of estrus cycle for heifers (default is 2.5).

avg_estrus_cycle_cow.description: Average length of estrus cycle for cows (default is 21).

std_estrus_cycle_cow.description: Standard deviation of the length of estrus cycle for cows (default is 4).

avg_estrus_cycle_after_pgf.description: Average days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the ‘PGFatPD’ resynch protocol (default is 5).

std_estrus_cycle_after_pgf.description: Standard deviation of days between the injection of PGF and the occurrence of estrus in the ‘PGFatPD’ resynch protocol (default is 2).

wood_l.description: Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level.

properties.description: Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level,
Parameter l in the Wood’s equation. It is a scale factor for the production level.

wood_m.description: Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak

properties.description: Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak
Parameter m in the Wood’s equation. It indicates the growth rate in milk yield until peak

wood_n.description: Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak

properties.description: Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak
Parameter n in the Wood’s equation. It describes the rate of decline after the peak

parity_death_prob.description: Death rate for first, second, third, and later lactations

properties.description: Death rate for first, second, third, and later lactations

parity_cull_prob.description: Culling rate for first, second, third, and later lactations

properties.description: Culling rate for first, second, third, and later lactations

feet_leg_cull_prob.description: Culling rate for feet and leg reasons

methane_mitigation_method.description: Methane Mitigation Method -- The type of enteric methane mitigation supplement that is fed to the lactating dairy cattle

3-NOP_additive_amount.description: 3-NOP Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the 3-NOP mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

monensin_additive_amount.description: Monensin Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the monensin mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

essential_oils_additive_amount.description: Essential Oils Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the essential oils mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

seaweed_additive_amount.description: Seaweed Additive Amount (mg/kg DMI) -- The dosage of the seaweed mitigation additive (mg/kg DMI)

housing.description: Housing -- The type of housing management for the herd.

pasture_concentrate.description: Pasture Concentration -- Amount of concentrate supplementation provided if animals are housed on pasture. (kg)

methane_model.description: Methane Model -- The method used to estimate enteric methane emissions.

user_input.description: User Input -- A bool value indicating if the user will provide the ration or diet formulation they would like to feed to the cattle (true) or not (false).

formulation_interval.description: Formulation Interval -- The length of time in days between when the diets are reformulated.

id.description: Pen ID -- The index of the pen.

pen_name.description: Pen Name -- The name or identifier of a given pen.

animal_combination.description: Animal Combination -- The valid combinations of animal types that can be in a pen.

vertical_dist_to_milking_parlor.description: Vertical Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The elevation gain (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor.

horizontal_dist_to_milking_parlor.description: Horizontal Distance to Milking Parlor (m) -- The distance (in meters) between the pen and the milking parlor.

number_of_stalls.description: Number of Stalls -- The number of stalls in the pen.

housing_type.description: Housing Type -- The type of barn the pen is in.

pen_type.description: Pen Type -- The type of stalls the pen has.

max_stocking_density.description: Max Stocking Density -- The maximum ration between the number of animals in the pen and the number of stalls in the pen.

manure_management_scenario_id.description: Manure Management Scenario ID -- The ID number of the manure management practices that are used for this pen.

crop_schedules.description: Array of all crop schedules to be executed over the run of the simulation.

properties.description: Contains all the properties necessary to create a CropSchedule object.

crop_species.description: Name of the crop being grown.

harvest_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to harvest

harvest_years.description: Calendar years in which the harvesting occurs

harvest_operations.description: Operation(s) with which this crop will be harvested.

harvest_type.description: Whether the crop uses scheduled harvests or optimal harvests

planting_days.description: Julian day(s) of year to plant

planting_years.description: Calendar years in which the planting occurs

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this crop schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

available_fertilizer_mixes.description: All the available fertilizer mixes that are available besides the default ones.

properties.description: The name and nutrient breakdown of a single fertilizer mix.

N.description: Fraction of nitrogen contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

P.description: Fraction of phosphorus contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

K.description: Fraction of potassium contained in the fertilizer mix by mass.

mix_names.description: List of the mix names that will be used for the corresponding fertilizer application.

years.description: List of years in which fertilizer will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which fertilizer will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding fertilizer applications should contain.
Units: kg.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the fertilizer is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of fertilizer which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this fertilizer application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which manure will be applied.

days.description: List of days on which manure will be applied.

nitrogen_masses.description:
List of minimum nitrogen masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

phosphorus_masses.description:
List of minimum phosphorus masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

potassium_masses.description:
List of minimum potassium masses that the corresponding manure applications should contain.
Units: kg.

coverage_fractions.description: List of fractions of how much of the field is covered by the corresponding manure application.

application_depths.description:
List of depths at which the manure is injected into the soil.
Units: mm.

surface_remainder_fractions.description: List of fractions of manure which remain on the soil surface when applied via injection.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this manure application schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

years.description: List of years in which tillage will occur.

days.description: List of days on which tilling will occur.

tillage_depths.description:
List of depths that the corresponding tillage applications reach.
Units: mm.

incorporation_fractions.description: List of fractions of surface pools that get incorporated into the soil during applications.

mixing_fractions.description: List of fractions of soil layer pools that are available to mix into other soil layers.

pattern_repeat.description: Number of times that this tillage schedule should be repeated.

pattern_skip.description: Number of years to be skipped between schedule repetitions.

natural_gas_cost_kwh.description: cost of natural gas per kwh

alfalfa_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from alfalfa tillage

corn_grain_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn grain tillage

corn_silage_tillage_emissions.description: The amount of total tonnes CO2-eq generated from corn silage tillage

calf_feeds.description: Calf Feeds (raised off farm - 24 hrs of age).

growing_feeds.description: Growing Feeds (HeiferI and HeiferII - return at 20 months) -- HeiferI is the number of youngstock post-weaning and before breeding. Heifer II is the number of heifers eligible for breeding and in early pregnancy.

close_up_feeds.description: Close Up Feeds (HeiferIII and Dry Cows) -- HeiferIII is the number of close-up heifers and Dry Cows are non-lactating cows.

storage_type.description: Storage Type -- The type of storage unit used. This only applies to farm grown forage feeds
storage_type.pattern: ^(8' Diameter Bag|10' Diameter Bag|12' Diameter Bag|14' Diameter Bag|Upright Silo - Traditional|Upright Silo - Oxygen-Excluding|Bunker Silo|Pile|Wrapped Bale|Bale - Covered|Bale - Uncovered|Bin)$

moisture.description: Moisture -- The management practices used that determine the dry matter content of the preserved feed.

additive.description: Additive -- Type of additive added to the forage material before ensiling.

package_density.description: Package Density -- The density of ensiled feed material, kg DM /m3

ventilation.description: Ventilation -- True if the storage unit has appropriate ventilation.

removal_rate.description: Removal Rate -- Average rate of removal of material from the storage unit or silo described as the horizontal distance from the front of the storage. In units of meters.

initial_dry_matter.description: Initial Dry Matter -- The mass of feed dry matter in the storage unit at initiation of the simulation.

tolerance.description: Tolerance -- Allowable +/- percentage variance in each of the defined percentage values.

milk_reduction_maximum.description: Milk Reduction Percent -- Allowable amount of milk reduction (kg)

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

Name.description: A general common name for the feed as defined within RuFaS.

feed_description.description: A more specific description of the feed that uniquely distinguishes it from other feeds with a similar or same name.

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed (group).

units.description: The unit of measurement used for the feed.

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed.

DM.description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

CP.description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

NDICP.description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

ADICP.description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

Kd.description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

dRUP.description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

is_fat.description: Identifier of fat type feed (0 or 1).

is_wetforage.description: Identifier of wet forage type feed (0 or 1).

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.

Fd_Category.pattern: ^(Animal Protein|By-Product/Other|Calf Liquid Feed|Energy Source|Fat Supplement|Fatty Acid Supplement|Grain Crop Forage|Grass/Legume Forage|Pasture|Plant Protein|Vitamin/Mineral)$

feed_type.description: The general type or category of the feed.

DM.description: Dry matter content of the feed (% DM).

CP.description: Crude protein content of the feed (% DM).

Kd.description: Feed degradation rate of B fraction (% h).

dRUP.description: Digested rumen undegradable protein (% of RUP).

ADICP.description: Acid detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

NDICP.description: Neutral detergent insoluble nitrogen multiplied by 6.25 (% DM).

is_fat.description: Identifier of fat type feed (0 or 1).

is_wetforage.description: Identifier of wet forage type feed (0 or 1).

manure_management_scenarios.description: Manure Management Scenarios -- Add as many different manure scenarios as needed

scenario_id.description: Scenario ID -- An identification number for livestock enclosures.

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

manure_handler.description: Manure Handling Method -- Method for cleaning barn alleyways.
manure_handler.pattern: ^(flush system|alley scraper|manual scraping|tillage|manual skid steer scraping)$

manure_separator.description: Manure Separator Type -- The type of solid-liquid separator equipment to separate coarse fibrous solids/sand

manure_treatment_methods.description: Manure Treatment Methods -- Select the Manure Treatment Methods.
manure_treatment_methods.pattern: ^(slurry storage underfloor|slurry storage outdoor|open lots|compost bedded pack barn|anaerobic lagoon|anaerobic digestion|other)$

bedding_type.description: Bedding Type -- The material used for bedding pack.

manure_handler_type.description: Manure Handling Method -- Method for cleaning barn alleyways.
manure_handler_type.pattern: ^(flush system|alley scraper|manual scraping|tillage|manual skid steer scraping)$

manure_separator_type.description: Manure Separator Type -- The type of solid-liquid separator equipment to separate coarse fibrous solids/sand

manure_treatment_type.description: Manure Treatment Methods -- Select the Manure Treatment Methods.
manure_treatment_type.pattern: ^(slurry storage underfloor|slurry storage outdoor|open lots|compost bedded pack barn|anaerobic lagoon|anaerobic digestion|other)$

second_moisture_condition_parameter.description:
Curve number parameter for average moisture condition equation.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - CN2.

average_subbasin_slope.description:
Slope of the field, measured as rise over run.
Units: meters / meters or unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - HRU_SLP.

slope_length.description:
Length of the slope.
Units: meters.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - SLSUBBSN.

manning_roughness_coefficient.description:
Manning's "n" value for overland flow.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU - OV_N.

support_practice_factor.description:
Ratio of soil loss with a specific support practice based on slope characteristics.This value adjusts for terracing, contouring, and stripcropping, and these features are not present in V1, so this value IS NOT used.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .MGT - USLE_P.

albedo.description:
Ratio of solar radiation reflected by soil to amount of incident upon it.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ALB

initial_residue.description:
Amount of residue present on the soil surface at the start of the simulation.
Units: kg / ha.

soil_evaporation_compensation_coefficien.description:
Modifies depth distribution used to meet soil evaporative demand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .HRU, .BSN - ESCO

soil_layers.description: The soil layers that this profile contains. Each element of the array should be a `soil_layer` object.

properties.description: This represents a single soil layer.

bottom_depth.description:
Bottom depth of this soil layer.
Units: mm.

soil_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

wilting_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

field_capacity_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in this layer when at field capacity.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

saturation_point_water_concentration.description:
Concentration of water in a layer when it has become saturated.
Units: mm water / mm soil.

saturated_hydraulic_conductivity.description:
Measure of ease of water movement through the soil.
Units: mm / hour.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_K.

initial_temperature.description:
Temperature of the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: degrees Celsius.

bulk_density.description:
Ratio of mass of solid particles to total volume of soil.
Units: Megagrams / cubic meter or grams / cubic centimeter.

percent_organic_carbon_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is organic carbon.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CBN.

percent_clay_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is clay.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_CLAY.

percent_silt_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is silt.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SILT.

percent_sand_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is sand.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_SAND.

percent_rock_content.description:
Percent of soil weight that is rock.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .SOL - SOL_ROCK.

initial_labile_inorganic_phosphorus_conc.description:
Concentration of labile inorganic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_fresh_organic_phosphorus_concent.description:
Concentration of fresh organic phosphorus at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_nitrate_concentration.description:
Concentration of nitrate in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

initial_soil_ammonium_concentration.description:
Concentration of ammonium in the layer at the beginning of the simulation.
Units: milligrams / kilogram soil.

humus_mineralization_rate_factor.description:
Rate factor for humus mineralization of active organic nutrients (N and P).
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CMN.

ammonium_volatilization_cation_exchange_.description:
Controls the rate of ammonium volatilization.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical Documentation eqn. 3:1.3.5.

denitrification_rate_coefficient.description:
Controls the rate of denitrification.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - CDN.

denitrification_threshold_water_content.description:
Fraction of field capacity water content above which denitrification takes place.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Input .BSN - SDNCO

residue_fresh_organic_mineralization_rat.description:
Fraction of residue that will decompose in a day given optimal conditions.
Unitless.
Reference SWAT Input: .BSN - RSDCO.

soil_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's soil specification.

crop_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's crop schedule specification.

fertilizer_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's fertilizer application schedule specification.

manure_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's manure application schedule specification.

tillage_management_specification.description: Name of the metadata blob that contains the data for this field's tillage application schedule specification.

absolute_latitude.description:
The absolute latitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

longitude.description:
The longitude of the center of this field.
Units: degrees.

minimum_daylength.description:
Length of the shortest day of the year for watershed the field is located in.
Units: hours.

seasonal_high_water_table.description:
True if the HRU that contains the field has a high seasonal water table, false otherwise.
Unitless.
Reference: SWAT Theoretical documentation section 2:3.2, SWAT Input .HRU - IWATABLE.

watering_amount_in_liters.description:
Amount of water to be applied as irrigation at the end of a specified interval.
Units: liters.

watering_interval.description:
Number of days that make up the irrigation interval.
Units: days.

supplement_manure_nutrient_deficiencies.description: Determines if nutrient deficient manure applications are supplemented with chemical fertilizer.

high.description: The maximum air temperature of the day (°C).

low.description: The minimum air temperature of the day (°C).

avg.description: The average air temperature of the day (°C).

Hday.description: The solar radiation of the day (MJ m^-2).

rufas_id.description: Unique integer identifier for feeds used within the RuFaS model.
